## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role combines editorial expertise with workflow optimization and AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Responsibilities include client management, content quality control, and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Ideal candidate has strong editorial background and interest in leveraging technology for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Work involves diverse content types, from traditional blog posts to complex programmatic SEO projects](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach to Content Creation

  - [Focuses on atomizing content and leveraging technology](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Uses workflows and pipelines to automate and scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Aims to create high-quality, client-specific content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Constantly iterates on processes to improve output and reduce manual effort](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

### Role Responsibilities

  - [Review and manage weekly deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Interact with content managers to resolve issues and improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Conduct client meetings and manage expectations](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Identify and articulate workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Perform quality control on content outputs](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Contribute to product development and feature ideation](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Typical Workday

  - [Review scope of deliverables for the week](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Check progress with content managers](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Review and edit content](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Attend client meetings (avg. 1 per week per client)](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Troubleshoot workflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Collaborate on process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Engage in content strategy and new product development](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

### Content Types and Distribution

  - [Editorial content (blog posts, articles): \~65%](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO projects: \~15%](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=2217.0)
  - [Newsletters and social media content: \~10%](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
  - [Experimental/ancillary projects: \~10%](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
  - [Product development input: \~10% of time](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

### Workflow and Pipeline Management

  - [Use tools like Airtable, Notion, and various AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Create and optimize workflows for content creation and editing](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Build pipelines to link multiple workflows for complex projects](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Identify areas for automation and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to consider role fit based on discussion](https://fathom.video/share/ZznKg8dWucLwk4RoNRZ9MiZo4mh9RydA?tab=summary&timestamp=2347.0)
